headline: KLA Stock's Look Into The Future
summary: Management is signaling a multi-year surge in demand, but with the stock at all-time highs, the real question is what happens next.

headline: Mizuho Raises its Price Target on Lam Research (LRCX)
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the 15 Most Promising Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 27, 2026, Mizuho raised the firm’s price target on Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) to $380 from $330 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. Mizuho raised its wafer fab equipment spending estimate for 2026 to $153B […]

headline: What Do Analysts Say About Lam Research (LRCX)’s Earnings Outlook?
summary: Showing strong hedge fund and Wall Street support, Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) ranks among the best AI infrastructure stocks and carries an upside potential of 21.0% (street high). Wafer fab equipment demand is getting a significant rerating from Wall Street, and Lam Research is one of the clearest beneficiaries. Thus, analyst sentiment on Lam Research […]
